_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: disease-specific survival due to solid tumor was significantly reduced in Nf1+/− mutant mice receiving 30 Gy of CI (p=0.019, log-rank test)
details: Solid tumor incidence significantly reduced at 30 Gy CI dose (p=0.019, log-rank test)
